title: The Shrine Maiden's Riddle
setup_text: A shrine maiden blocks your path. She speaks:
npc_dialogue: 「あなたは何を求めているのですか？」

options.outcome_text: The maiden smiles and steps aside, placing a glowing scroll in your hands.

reward.description: A random card in your deck is upgraded.

options.outcome_text: The maiden nods solemnly. 'Power alone will not carry you to the summit.'

title: The Wandering Monk
setup_text: An old monk sits by the road, studying a worn scroll. He looks up and asks:
npc_dialogue: 「この言葉の意味がわかりますか？」
npc_dialogue_translation: Do you understand the meaning of these words?

options.outcome_text: The monk beams. 'A rare traveler!' He shares his provisions.
The monk chuckles. 'Honesty is its own wisdom. But the mountain does not forgive ignorance.' A cold wind saps your strength.

title: The Spirit Fork
setup_text: The path splits. A small fox spirit sits at the crossroads, cleaning its paws. It looks up:
npc_dialogue: 「右か左か、どちらに行きますか？右は「危険」、左は「安全」と書いてあります。」
npc_dialogue_translation: Right or left — which will you go? The right sign reads 'Danger', the left reads 'Safety'.

options.outcome_text: The dangerous path is littered with abandoned relics. You pocket a glowing item.
The safe path is peaceful. You arrive rested.
